name: Hong Sabud Lai
original_name: หงส์สะบัดลาย
overview: After witnessing her parents' murder, Nay was sent to Paris to be raised by her father’s best friend, while her brother Vee stayed in Thailand. Ten years later, Nay, now a regal woman, is engaged to Siwat, but they must avenge her parents' murder before marrying. To stay safe upon returning to Thailand, they hire Rabin as her bodyguard.

trailers.title: หงส์สะบัดลาย ~ Teaser 1 (Hong Sabud Lai)
